name: manada-skills
description: Create, customize, deploy and invoke Claude Code subagents across every scope (plugin, project, user-global) and via the Claude Agent SDK.

plugins.name: manada-skills
plugins.description: Build a pack of specialized Claude Code subagents. Covers the three scopes (plugin/project/user-global) and the headless Claude Agent SDK; per-agent customization (model, tools, preloaded skills, persistent memory, effort, color); the security limits on plugin-shipped agents and how to lift them; harness vs SDK; subscription auth; and when parallel fan-out pays off vs adds overhead.
